name: HTS_SCHEDULE_GEN_PROFILES_B
description: Base table containing schedule generation profile information used to generate schedules.

columns.Name: SCHED_GEN_PROFILE_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key. Unique system generated identifier for a schedule generation profile

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Standard Enterprise Identifier column for multi tenancy support

columns.Name: SCHED_PROFILE_CODE
columns.Comments: Schedule Generation Profile Code

columns.Name: ACTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Schedule Generation Profile Active Start Date

columns.Name: ACTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Schedule Generation Profile Active End Date

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_PERIOD_WEEKS
columns.Comments: Schedule Period Cycle in Weeks

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_PERIOD_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Schedule Period Start Date

columns.Name: GEN_WINDOW_START
columns.Comments: Number of days before the schedule period starts to open the schedule generation window.

columns.Name: GEN_WINDOW_END
columns.Comments: Number of days before the schedule period starts to close the schedule generation window.

columns.Name: SELF_SCHED_START_OFFSET
columns.Comments: Number of days before the schedule period starts to open the self scheduling window.

columns.Name: SELF_SCHED_END_OFFSET
columns.Comments: Number of days before the schedule period starts to close the self scheduling window.

columns.Name: START_OF_WORK_WEEK
columns.Comments: First Day of the Schedule Period Week

columns.Name: MON_IS_WEEKEND_FLAG
columns.Comments: MON_IS_WEEKEND_FLAG

columns.Name: TUE_IS_WEEKEND_FLAG
columns.Comments: TUE_IS_WEEKEND_FLAG

columns.Name: WED_IS_WEEKEND_FLAG
columns.Comments: WED_IS_WEEKEND_FLAG

columns.Name: THU_IS_WEEKEND_FLAG
columns.Comments: THU_IS_WEEKEND_FLAG

columns.Name: FRI_IS_WEEKEND_FLAG
columns.Comments: FRI_IS_WEEKEND_FLAG

columns.Name: SAT_IS_WEEKEND_FLAG
columns.Comments: SAT_IS_WEEKEND_FLAG

columns.Name: SUN_IS_WEEKEND_FLAG
columns.Comments: SUN_IS_WEEKEND_FLAG

columns.Name: AUTO_GENERATE_SCHED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Specify if the schedule is automatically generated when the schedule generation window opens.

columns.Name: AUTO_GENERATE_TYPE
columns.Comments: When the schedule is automatically generated, specify the generation method type, such as open shift or automatic assignment.

columns.Name: AUTO_PUBLISH_SCHED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Specify if the schedule is automatically published 1 day after the schedule generation window closes.

columns.Name: ALERT_FINALIZE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Specify whether to send schedulers notifications to finalize their schedules.

columns.Name: ALERT_FINALIZE_DAYS_OFFSET
columns.Comments: ALERT_FINALIZE_DAYS_OFFSET

columns.Name: JOB_POS_INCL_EXCL_RULE
columns.Comments: JOB_POS_INCL_EXCL_RULE

columns.Name: IS_DRAFT
columns.Comments: Indicates whether a profile is still in draft mode and has not been fully validated.

columns.Name: RULE_SET_ID
columns.Comments: RULE_SET_ID

columns.Name: DAY_START_TIME_OFFSET
columns.Comments: Day Start Time offset

columns.Name: FLOAT_BETWEEN_DEPTS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicator to define if workers can float between departments of the schedule generation profile

columns.Name: FLOAT_POOL_DEPTS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicator to define if self scheduling allowed for float pool department workers

columns.Name: GRACE_PERIOD
columns.Comments: Clock integration Threshold to ignore violation

columns.Name: START_EARLY_PERIOD
columns.Comments: Clock integration start early grace period for violation

columns.Name: START_LATE_PERIOD
columns.Comments: Clock integration Start late grace period for violation

columns.Name: END_EARLY_PERIOD
columns.Comments: Clock integration end early grace period for violation

columns.Name: END_LATE_PERIOD
columns.Comments: Clock integration end late grace period for violation

columns.Name: START_EARLY_VIOLATION_TYPE
columns.Comments: Clock integration start early violation message

columns.Name: START_LATE_VIOLATION_TYPE
columns.Comments: Clock integration start late violation message

columns.Name: END_EARLY_VIOLATION_TYPE
columns.Comments: Clock integration end early violation message

columns.Name: END_LATE_VIOLATION_TYPE
columns.Comments: Clock integration end late violation message

columns.Name: SELF_SCHED_RTN_ENABLED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Specifies if the rotation is enabled for Self-scheduling.

columns.Name: SELF_SCHED_ROTATION_TYPE
columns.Comments: Rotation Type used for Self-scheduling

columns.Name: SELF_SCHED_RTN_LAST_UPD_DATE
columns.Comments: Specifies the date when self-scheduling rotation is last updated.

columns.Name: DEVIATION_ALLOW_TIME_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether time deviation is allowed for operating shifts.

columns.Name: DEVIATION_ALLOW_START_MINUTES
columns.Comments: Indicates the default deviation allowance in minutes for operating shift start time.

columns.Name: DEVIATION_ALLOW_END_MINUTES
columns.Comments: Indicates the default deviation allowance in minutes for operating shift end time.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
